context: Tests whether the agent implements the points earn engine with correct earn rates, non-purchase earn amounts, birthday multiplier logic, transaction logging, tier evaluation trigger, and minimum order threshold.

checklist.name: Base earn rate
checklist.description: Uses a base earn rate of 1 point per $1 of order value for purchase transactions (e.g. Math.floor(orderValue * 1))

checklist.name: Review points amount
checklist.description: Awards exactly 50 points for 'review' reason (not a calculated value based on order amount)

checklist.name: Birthday multiplier doubling
checklist.description: During birthday month, multiplies the tier multiplier by 2 (e.g. tier.multiplier * 2), not a fixed bonus

checklist.name: Transaction balanceBefore
checklist.description: Logs the customer's points balance BEFORE the transaction in the loyaltyTransactions record

checklist.name: Transaction balanceAfter
checklist.description: Logs the customer's points balance AFTER the transaction in the loyaltyTransactions record

checklist.name: Transaction reason field
checklist.description: Logs the earn reason (e.g. 'purchase', 'review', 'referral', 'signup') in the transaction record

checklist.name: Tier evaluation triggered
checklist.description: Calls evaluateTierStatus (or equivalent) after awarding points so tier upgrades are immediately assessed

checklist.name: Minimum order threshold
checklist.description: Enforces a minimum order value for earning points on purchases (e.g. $15 minimum), and does NOT award points for orders below this threshold

checklist.name: loyaltyPointsEarned update
checklist.description: Updates both the customer's current balance (loyaltyPoints) AND their lifetime earned counter (loyaltyPointsEarned) when points are awarded
